title: chenopodium benthamii subsp. rectum
intro: Chenopodium benthamii subsp. rectum, also known as Chenopodium rectum or stramonium, is a plant species belonging to the Chenopodiaceae family. It is native to North America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant's leaves and seeds have been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits, including antioxidant and immunomodulatory properties. Chenopodium benthamii subsp. rectum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile remedy in herbal medicine.
